title: Farmer's Delight Offhand Cutting Board Interaction
description: restores offhand interaction support for Farmer’s Delight cutting boards.
body:
This mod restores offhand interaction support for Farmer’s Delight cutting boards.

Farmer’s Delight 1.3+ changed cutting board interaction to be fully controlled by the main hand, removing the older offhand placement behavior. This mod keeps the new Farmer’s Delight behavior that allows placing an entire stack of ingredients at once, while also allowing players to place ingredients from their offhand onto the cutting board again.

This is a small compatibility/quality-of-life mod for players who prefer the older dual-hand workflow without losing the newer stack placement feature.

## Support

If you'd like to support my modding work, including maintenance, updates, and compatibility work, Patreon is available here: [https://patreon.com/vomiter\_scp](https://patreon.com/vomiter_scp)
